allow: Bash(python -c "from app.services.pipeline_manager import pipeline_manager; from app.schemas.pipeline import PipelineStatusResponse; from app.routers.characters import router; print\('OK'\)")

Bash(python -m py_compile app/services/settings_service.py app/schemas/settings.py app/routers/settings.py app/services/character_service.py app/services/appearance_service.py app/services/pipeline_manager.py)

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); running=[j for j in data['items'] if j['status']=='running']; print\('running:', len\(running\)\); print\('queued:', len\([j for j in data['items'] if j['status']=='queued']\)\); print\('total jobs:', len\(data['items']\)\); [print\(j['status'], j['series_tag'][:30] if j['series_tag'] else '[EMPTY]', j['phase'], j['message'][:50] if j.get\('message'\) else ''\) for j in data['items'][:5]]")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; data=json.load\(sys.stdin\); jobs=data['items']; running=[j for j in jobs if j['status']=='running']; print\('--- RUNNING ---'\); [print\(j['series_tag'], j['phase'], j['message'][:60]\) for j in running[:5]]; print\('--- ALL statuses ---'\); from collections import Counter; print\(Counter\(j['status'] for j in jobs\)\)")
